title: The Briefing: Financial Services
summary: Anthropic held a virtual briefing session where leaders from major banks discussed their deployments and use cases of Claude across their financial services organizations. The event showcased real-world applications of the Claude model in banking.
writeup: This video documents a virtual briefing hosted by Anthropic in which leaders from major banks describe how they have deployed Claude across their financial services organizations. It matters because it surfaces real-world banking applications rather than hypothetical use cases, drawing on accounts from the institutions running the model. The key takeaway is a look at the specific deployments and use cases these banks have adopted for Claude.
